div1.entryFree:
Shade, vb. 1) to darken: bright orient pearl, alack, too timely --d, Pilgr. 133.
2) to shelter: good angels fly o'er thy royal head and s. thy person under their blessed wings, H8 V, 1, 162. ere in our own house I do s. my head, Cor. II, 1, 211.
3) to hide: sweet leaves, s. folly, LLL IV, 3, 44.
